# Ignored Examples

- Keep this visible rule.

```md
# Fenced Heading
- Do not extract fenced bullets.
IMPORTANT: Do not extract fenced warnings.
```

~~~md
- Do not extract tilde fenced bullets.
IMPORTANT: Do not extract tilde fenced warnings.
~~~

````md
```json
# Nested Fenced Heading
- Do not extract nested fenced bullets.
```
````

> IMPORTANT: Do not extract quoted warnings.

## After Fence

- Use visible rules after fences.

Regular prose.
